productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Capella Navy Blue Shoe
description: Get ready to get some serious attention with these Capella slip-on shoes from rockport. Designed for continuous wear and superior walking comfort, these shoes are a great blend of form and function. Team these with chinos and polo neck tees for casual Fridays or for weekend getaways.Upper Felt slip-on upper with a soft padded tongue Stitch detailing on the upper for a uber cool look Perforated insole for superior ventilation Carbon rubber embedded along the periphery of the shoe for shock absorption Midsole Polyurethane (PU) midsole offers durability for long-term wear & shock absorbent-cushioning to help reduce foot fatigue Outsole Rubber outsole with horizontal grooves give dependable grip on a variety of surfaces Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
